text.label: Tier Name
text.help-text: Display label for this sponsorship level, e.g. Presenting, Eagle, Birdie, Tee. Appears as a heading on the page.

text.label: Tier Subtitle
text.help-text: Optional tagline shown below the tier name, e.g. Foundational Partners or Distinguished Sponsors. Leave blank to omit.

asset.label: Logo Image
asset.help-text: Upload the sponsor's logo. PNG or SVG with a transparent background is recommended. Logos display at a uniform size regardless of tier.

text.label: Sponsor Name
text.help-text: The full legal name of the sponsoring organization. Used by screen readers and as fallback text if the image fails to load.

text.label: Sponsor Website URL
text.help-text: Optional. If provided, the logo becomes a clickable link. Must be a full URL including https://, e.g. https://www.acmecorp.com

text.label: Logo Background Color
text.help-text: Optional. For logos with white or light-colored artwork on a transparent background, enter a hex color code WITHOUT the # sign, e.g. 1a1a2e for dark navy or 333333 for dark gray. Leave blank to use the default white background.
